name: Biblio - Reading App for Books and Comics in VR

reviews.review_description:
1. This app needs the ability to connect to a home server, like CDisplayEx (that's an ex. of app with that ability). It would make pulling all my manga much easier then trying to download all of it.

2. Increase in controllers for reading, using the hand tracking is fun but turning the page is super painful the arrow buttons on the side didn't even work. So that needs fixing and an option to use controllers for turning the page because not everyone likes using the hand tracking.

If we got those two things I would give five stars and pay 5 dollars for it if I needed to.

P.S. The visuals of the books are much easier for me to read the words on than my phone or tablet. Keep up the great work! Thank you!
Can't download PDF. Tried a few times using a few different processes. Didnt work. Hope it gets fixed just for uploading PDFs...... And eventually EPUB would be nice

I’m unable to download anything. When I try, all I get is an infinite message to wait while it’s downloading. If not for that, it would be a nice app. I am able to utilize it by opening my browser while in it and reading from that. But I can do that with a lot of other apps without having to bother positioning my browser just right in order to cover up that interminable “wait while downloading”.
The controls are just horrible, everything is just rly bad implemented, 0% intuitive and watch manga in the browser is still better that fighting with this app to get it to work

Great idea. Please may I suggest the option to use the controllers, I like the idea of reading some graphics novels at night and considering there's no hand tracking in the dark it makes the app useless! Also, whilst novel, it's much easier to use the joy stick to change pages rather than waving your hand. Please can I also request more abstract scenes, like being in the clouds or space. Can't wait for the updates.

Love this app! Been reading some books of Jordan Peterson, as reading the usual way gets monotonous sometimes.

Very fun, intuitive and straight to the point!

Read your Manga and books in glorious VR! Biblio is a brilliant app! You can resize the screen to your liking, rotate the angle, change the background scene, and flick the pages, all with just the use of your hands. This is still an early version but future updates will make this a staple VR app. Thank you dev and keep up the good work. 👍
